risk_title: Humanitarian Crisis Coinciding with Pandemic Response
risk_summary: Health worker deployment and resource allocation have been significantly strained by humanitarian crises occurring simultaneously with the COVID-19 pandemic, affecting project implementation priorities and health system capacity.
evidence_quote: Furthermore, in many regions, the pandemic coincided with existing or new humanitarian crises, further stretching resources and demanding additional health worker deployments.

risk_title: Shifting Priorities from Evolving COVID-19 Emergency
risk_summary: Multiple project indicators are lagging and end targets will not be met due to reallocation of health system resources and shifting priorities resulting from the evolving COVID-19 emergency, affecting implementation of planned activities.
evidence_quote: five other indicators are lagging due to shifting priorities resulting from the evolving COVID-19 emergency, which has led to a reallocation of health system resources.

risk_summary: Vaccine hesitancy, particularly among adolescents and in urban areas, is preventing achievement of vaccination targets and requiring targeted communication strategies to address community concerns.
evidence_quote: End target will not be met due to shifting priorities resulting from the evolving COVID-19 emergency, and as well as vaccine hesitancy among adolescents.
